status.constitutionalAuthorityStatementText:
[Congressional Record Volume 172, Number 98 (Wednesday, June 10, 2026)]
[House]
From the Congressional Record Online through the Government Publishing Office [www.gpo.gov]
By Mr. WESTERMAN:
H.R. 9250.
Congress has the power to enact this legislation pursuant
to the following:
Article 1 of the U.S. Constitution
[Page H4086]

latestAction.text: Ordered to be Reported in the Nature of a Substitute (Amended) by Voice Vote.
